overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a sunset walk through a desert-edge urban district. The player moves from a quiet graffiti-tagged alley through crowded streets and finally enters a summoned Delamain autonomous vehicle in an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with graffiti-tagged industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a wall with large 'BROKEN' graffiti and a green dumpster

entered.detail: large concrete wall with 'BROKEN' spray-painted in stylized white letters
tall palm tree with visible trunk and fronds against the sky
low dark industrial structure with closed garage doors
rocky desert mountains visible in the distance
elevated highway or monorail structure with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a quiet urban sidewalk beside a building tagged with large 'BROKEN' graffiti. The player walks forward past palm trees and a dumpster, with desert mountains visible in the background and an elevated highway structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with pedestrian crossing

events.description: crossing the street alongside a dense crowd of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd of pedestrians while crossing the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
group of pedestrians in colorful cyberpunk attire walking along the building front

entered.detail: row of commercial buildings with storefronts and awnings
floating futuristic advertisement with purple and blue lighting
massive futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the district

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bustling commercial street filled with pedestrians in cyberpunk fashion. The player crosses the road amidst the crowd, passing holographic advertisements and shops, with a massive megabuilding towering in the distance against the golden sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza and parking area near elevated highway

events.description: moving from the busy street into a more open parking lot area with scattered vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area toward a parked black vehicle with checkered doors

entered.detail: black futuristic sedan with distinctive white checkered door pattern
row of parked vehicles including a silver coupe
concrete ramp leading up to the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: Leaving the crowded street, the player enters an open plaza with cracked asphalt and scattered parked cars. The Delamain vehicle waits ahead near the highway overpass ramp, while the megabuilding looms to the right against the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle parking spot with Delamain taxi

events.description: approaching the Delamain vehicle as the doors automatically open and entering the driver's seat

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked Delamain vehicle and entering through the open driver's side door

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Delamain taxi in the final moments, the vehicle's doors opening automatically. Entering the car, the interior dashboard and checkered door pattern fill the view as the segment ends with the player seated inside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, graffiti-laden urban alleyway into the interior of an autonomous vehicle within a bustling city plaza. It begins on a desolate sidewalk beside a building tagged with BROKEN graffiti, moving past palm trees and a dumpster toward an elevated highway with desert mountains in the distance. As the camera advances, the quietude shifts into a crowded commercial street where the player weaves through pedestrians and holographic advertisements under the shadow of a towering megabuilding. The scene then opens into a wide plaza of cracked asphalt and parked cars, moving toward a waiting Delamain taxi positioned near a highway ramp against the golden sunset. Finally, the camera approaches the vehicle as the doors slide open, transitioning from the open city air into the checkered interior and dashboard of the car.
